# sntrLXdesigns

> sntrLXdesigns is a Finnish lighting design company run by Santeri Lehtonen, specialising in live concerts, touring productions, and corporate events.

## Services

- **Concert & Tour Lighting**: Lighting design, MA3 programming, and operation for touring artists and one-off shows.
- **Event Production**: Corporate events, trade exhibitions, and special occasions. Full lighting solutions from concept to showtime.
- **Consulting & Visualisation**: Pre-production planning, MA3 programming, show automation and network integration, previz renders, and technical document preparation.

## Contact

- Website: https://lxdesigns.fi
- Email: sntr@lxdesigns.fi
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/_sntr_/

## Company

- Registered in Finland (Y-tunnus: 3583437-1)
